query: Find 10 parcels in Kristiansand municipality that intersect 200-year storm-surge areas, sorted by teigid ascending.

1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get parcels (teig) in the municipality using kommunenummer filter

3.description: get 200-year storm-surge polygons (stormflo200ar_klimaarna) in the national layer

4.description: reduce storm-surge polygons to the municipality extent by intersecting with municipality geometry

5.description: find parcels that intersect the reduced storm-surge polygons

6.description: deduplicate to one row per parcel (teigid) using MIN if needed
